channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: YouTube Expands AI Deepfake Detection Tool to Politicians, Won’t Say If Trump Is Included
item.description: The tool lets verified users request unauthorized AI-generated videos featuring their likeness to be taken down.

item.title: Tilly Norwood's music video is so bad that I think we can all breathe a sigh of relief — for now
item.description: Particle6 has released AI actor Tilly Norwood's first music video, and it's awful for all the reasons you imagined.

item.title: Interstellar Comet 3I/Atlas Has Another Surprise: It’s Full of Alcohol
item.description: Analysis of the tail of 3I/Atlas reveals that it contains an anomalous proportion of methanol, a class of alcohol used in fuels.

item.title: AI-powered apps can make money, but struggle with long-term retention, new data shows
item.description: AI can drive stronger early monetization for apps, but sustaining value remains the challenge, RevenueCat's latest report finds.

item.title: Amazon wins a temporary injunction against Perplexity's Comet browser
item.description: Amazon has secured a temporary win in its fight with Perplexity over the use of AI shopping bots. Bloomberg reported that a San Francisco federal court has determined that Perplexity must stop using its Comet web browser's AI agent to make purchases for users on Amazon's marketplace. The AI company will have a week to appeal the decision, otherwise it has been ordered to stop accessing any password-protected areas of Amazon's systems and destroy its copies of Amazon's data while the two companies continue to argue their cases. "Amazon has provided strong evidence that Perplexity, through its ...

item.title: Samsung's award-winning S90F OLED TV drops to an unbelievable price of £788 in Amazon's Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon's UK Spring Sale has slashed Samsung's award-winning 48-inch S90F OLED to a new record-low price of just £788.

item.title: Windows 11 : Microsoft déploie son patch Tuesday de mars et inaugure plusieurs fonctions
item.description: Microsoft vient de déployer son troisième patch Tuesday de 2026 avec, au programme, plusieurs nouvelles fonctions, dont un (presque) SpeedTest, de nouveaux paramètres pour la webcam ainsi que le support natif de sysmon.

item.title: It’s Getting Hot Down Here: Subway Systems Have an Extreme Heat Problem
item.description: A new study found that above-ground temperatures directly influence subway passengers' complaints about uncomfortably high below-ground temperatures.

item.title: Wordle’s creator is back with a new game, and it’s a real chin scratcher
item.description: Josh Wardle had a hell of a tough act to follow. His last game, Wordle, became incredibly popular thanks to its blend of simplicity, clarity and shareability. Over four years (and a seven-figure sale of Wordle to The New York Times) later, Wardle has released his follow-up game. Like Wordle and its myriad clones, Parseword offers up one puzzle per day. It taps into the mechanics of cryptic crossword clues. So it might ask you to replace one of the words with a synonym, reverse it or find a homophone. You may need to remove letters from a word or combine it with another one to find the answer. ...

item.title: DHS Ousts CBP Privacy Officers Who Questioned ‘Illegal’ Orders
item.description: Department of Homeland Security leaders removed top privacy officers who objected to mislabeling government records to block their public release, WIRED has learned.

item.title: Mandiant’s founder just raised $190M for his autonomous AI agent security startup
item.description: Mandia, who sold his previous company Mandiant to Google for $5.4 billion in 2022, has launched an agentic security startup.

item.title: States’ trial against Live Nation could move forward as soon as next week
item.description: The Live Nation trial is not over yet. Several states look to be headed to trial on their own as soon as Monday unless they hash out a settlement in the next few days. On Tuesday, a day after the Justice Department revealed in court it had reached a settlement with Live Nation that a […]

item.title: Un van électrique avec 700 km d’autonomie, le Mercedes VLE frappe un énorme coup
item.description: Un van électrique capable de remplacer la voiture familiale ? Le VLE de Mercedes est une voiture de transport de personnes qui affiche enfin une autonomie digne de ce nom et une vitesse de recharge intéressante. Tout pour convaincre ?

item.title: Here's the final trailer for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
item.description:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is nearly upon us, as the hotly-anticipated sequel arrives in theaters on April 1. Nintendo recently dropped the final trailer for the film, which is filled with quick visual gags and nods to the source material.
There aren't too many actual reveals in this footage, as it covers a lot of the same ground as previous trailers. However, it does show that fan favorite Lumalee is returning as a prison guard of some sort, reversing the storyline from the original film in which the cheerfully nihilistic creature was trapped in a cage. Nintendo also released a larger pres...

item.title: Voici le Mercedes-Benz VLE, un van électrique avec plus de 700 km d’autonomie et une recharge ultra rapide
item.description: Voici le Mercedes-Benz VLE, le nouveau van électrique de la marque. Basé sur une plateforme inédite, il veut séduire aussi bien les familles nombreuses que les taxis et les VTC avec un déluge de technologie, une autonomie dépassant les 700 km et une recharge très rapide.

item.title: Je suis monté à bord du Mercedes-Benz VLE : pourquoi je pense que ce van électrique n’a aucun rival en Europe
item.description: Je suis monté à bord du Mercedes-Benz VLE, le nouveau van électrique de la marque. Promettant de ravir aussi bien les taxis parisiens que les VIP chinois, il met en avant sa technologie débordante et ses 700 km d'autonomie grâce à une plateforme dédiée. Voici mes premières impressions.

item.title: Judge blocks Perplexity’s AI agents from shopping on Amazon
item.description: A federal judge has issued an order blocking Perplexity's web browser-based AI agents from placing Amazon orders on a user's behalf, as reported earlier by Bloomberg. In a ruling on Monday, US District Judge Maxine Chesney writes that Amazon has "provided strong evidence" that Perplexity's Comet browser accesses user accounts "without authorization" from the retail […]...

item.title: 10 Essential Episodes of ‘The Orville’
item.description: With Seth MacFarlane teasing a (hopeful) season four (someday), here are the must-watch episodes of his underrated sci-fi series.

item.title: Hisense's 2026 mid-range mini-LED TV comes in sizes up to 116 inches, because why not — and you can choose to have Google TV or not
item.description: Hisense says people want ever-bigger TVs, so it's making big mini-LEDs for 2026

item.title: Nvidia might be about to reimagine AI agents at work with new 'NemoClaw' release
item.description: "NemoClaw" could be Nvidia's upcoming AI agent management and deployment platform.

item.title: How to tell if your kids are using a VPN - and should you be worried?
item.description: VPNs are becoming a workaround for children navigating age verification laws. So, what can you do to spot if your child is using one, and should you be worried?

item.title: Celebrate Mario Day with the best Super Mario and Nintendo home office gear to level-up your workspace
item.description: Let's-a go.

item.title: ChatGPT can now create interactive visuals to help you understand math and science concepts
item.description: On Tuesday, OpenAI introduced dynamic visual explanations, a new ChatGPT feature that allows users to see how formulas, variables, and mathematical relationships change in real time. Instead of just reading an explanation or looking at a static diagram, users can now interact directly with interactive visuals. For example, when exploring the Pythagorean theorem, you can […]...

item.title: Our Favorite Earbuds for Samsung Owners Are on Sale
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 FE are a great pairing for anyone with a Galaxy phone.

item.title: Philips just launched a new coffee maker with a 'conversational' virtual assistant to make sure your cappuccino is just right
item.description: This premium coffee maker can adjust its own internal brew settings to fine-tune your drinks — no barista knowledge or experience necessary.

item.title: Ce TV Philips Ambilight (4K, TitanOS) de 65 pouces éteint 26 % de son prix pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Avec les Ventes Flash d'Amazon, le Philips Ambilight 65PUS8200 devient un TV avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix grâce à cette remise de 180 euros.

item.title: U.S. military contractor likely built iPhone hacking tools used by Russian spies in Ukraine
item.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

item.title: Why Are Pro-Iran Bots Pushing AI Fakes of Epstein and Trump When There’s Real Material?
item.description: One popular video also features Elon Musk and Bill Gates.

item.title: Get wired in Amazon's Spring Sale: audiophile IEMs, portable hi-res players and more at lowest ever prices
item.description: Amazon's Spring Deal Days are here and I've picked out the best portable hi-fi deals live now, with some lowest-seen prices across audiophile products — enjoy!

item.title: The Iran war made oil prices more expensive. Your groceries could be next
item.description: Fertilizer that our food system relies on moves through the Strait of Hormuz, where global shipping has been essentially halted. The United States military action in Iran is making some Americans concerned about what they’ll pay at the pump to fuel their vehicles. But that’s not the only price spike that could come from the conflict.

item.title: Slay the Spire II is even better with a friend
item.description: Slay the Spire II launched in early access last week, and it's already an excellent sequel to one of the best roguelikes of all time. In many ways, it's very similar to its predecessor. Like Hades II and Hollow Knight: Silksong, Slay the Spire II mostly iterates on an already superb foundation. But it does […]

item.title: Test du Narwal V40 Station : l’aspirateur balais ultime pour les flemmards
item.description: La poussière vous dégoûte ? Vider un bac vous donne des boutons ? Narwal a peut-être la solution ultime. Le Narwal V40 Station ? Il vous promet d'offrir une puissance monstrueuse, deux batteries de série, et surtout une station d'accueil massive qui aspire la saleté à votre place.

item.title: Nouvelle enceinte Sonos Era 100 SL, quelles différences avec la Era 100 ?
item.description: En plus de sa nouvelle enceinte Sonos Play, la marque propose aussi une nouvelle enceinte Bluetooth qui se veut à la fois indépendante, mais qui peut également servir de module surround pour un home cinéma complet.

item.title: I can't run my D&D games without this list of gadgets, books and other essentials — and as luck would have it, they're all on sale at Amazon right now
item.description: 10 essentials I use all the time as a DM (and they're all on sale at Amazon).

item.title: How to watch Viki from anywhere – stream K-drama with a VPN
item.description: The spiritual successor to DramaFever is a streaming service that caters to fans of Asian films and TV. Here's how to watch Viki from anywhere with a VPN.

item.title: Crimson Desert will have three graphics modes across PlayStation and Xbox, including a performance one that boasts an upscaled 4K resolution at 60fps with ray tracing on PS5 Pro
item.description: Pearl Abyss has finally revealed the PC and console specifications for Crimson Desert ahead of the game's launch this month.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg Decides Meta Needs More Slop, Buys the Social Network for AI Agents
item.description: Because Facbook and Instagram don't have enough bots, apparently.

item.title: Andy Muschietti Assures Fans That ‘It: Welcome to Derry’ Will Return
item.description: HBO still hasn't made an official announcement, but the co-creator of the Stephen King show sounds awfully excited for more Pennywise.

item.title: Gemini chamboule tout dans Google Docs, Sheets, Drive et Slides (mais pas pour tout le monde)
item.description: Google met le paquet avec Gemini pour que l'IA transforme votre manière de travailler dans Workspace (Drive, Docs, Slides, Sheets). Mais tout le monde n'y a pas droit.

item.title: Finally some good news for RAM buyers — Corsair’s 32GB Vengeance DDR5-6000 kit is £126 off right now at Amazon
item.description: Save nearly 25% on the 32GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6000 kit right now, a rare win for RAM buyers.

item.title: How to watch Vanishing Act — stream FEDS season 2 episode 2 online from anywhere
item.description: Here’s how to watch FEDS season 2 episode 2 Vanishing Act online from anywhere.

item.title: HPE says it can change the terms (and price) of your contract depending on global hardware changes - is it just 'protecting its margins'?
item.description: HPE is moving to agile pricing and shorter quote commitment cycles due to rising DRAM and NAND prices.

item.title: Meilleur vélo électrique (VAE) : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Difficile de s'y retrouver dans la jungle des vélos électriques (VAE). Pour vous aider à choisir celui qu'il vous faut, nous avons testé et sélectionné les meilleurs vélos électriques du marché.

item.title: Ce laptop gaming MSI avec Ultra 7, RTX 5070 Ti et écran 240 Hz a droit à une remise de 34 % pendant les ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Écran très fluide, processeur puissant, carte graphique récente... Le MSI Vector 16 HX AI A2XW a tout pour satisfaire les gamers pointilleux en quête d'une machine rapide et réactive. Ce PC portable gamer bénéficie en plus d'une belle réduction pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon : on le trouve ainsi à 1 659 euros au lieu de 2 499 euros. ...

item.title: How to watch Newcastle vs Barcelona: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Champions League 2025/26 Round of 16 1st leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Newcastle vs Barcelona live streams from anywhere and for free, as St. James' Park hosts the Champions League Round of 16 1st leg.

item.title: ChatGPT will now generate interactive visuals to help you with math and science concepts
item.description: OpenAI is rolling out new interactive responses in ChatGPT it says are designed to make the chatbot more useful for learners. Starting today, ChatGPT will generate dynamic visuals when you ask it to explain select scientific and mathematical concepts, including the Pythagorean theorem, Coulomb's law and lens equations. When ChatGPT responds with an interactive visual, you'll be able to tweak any variables and the equation itself, allowing you to see how those changes affect the solution. With today's release, OpenAI says ChatGPT will respond with interactive visuals when asked about more than ...

item.title: The TSA website has a warning travelers should know about right now
item.description: About 50,000 TSA screeners are working without pay during the shutdown, leading to staffing shortages and massive security delays at some airports. If you’re traveling soon, some grueling wait times at the airport may be in your future thanks to a partial government shutdown. But to make matters even more complicated, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) is not currently updating its sites during the partial shutdown, meaning fliers can’t easily check TSA wait times before heading to the airport....

item.title: Air taxis move closer to reality as DOT approves eVTOL pilot programs in 26 states
item.description: Companies including Joby, Archer, and Beta will begin real-world testing of electric air taxis under new U.S. Department of Transportation pilots designed to help regulators integrate flying cars into American airspace. The U.S. Department of Transportation has approved eight pilot programs across 26 states that will allow eVTOL (electric vertical takeoff and landing) aircraft to begin real-world testing. The program will permit air taxi service in select cities, while data collected from participating companies will help the FAA develop regulations to scale the technology while keeping urban ...

item.title: U.S. homes sales increase in February amid easing mortgage rates
item.description: Home prices continued to rise last month, albeit more slowly. Sales of previously occupied U.S. homes picked up in February from the previous month as home shoppers took advantage of easing mortgage rates and a modest increase in properties on the market heading into the spring homebuying season.
